why: Maximal already-exists ambiguity: OpenAI ships as llm_openai, llm_vision_openai, AND embedding_openai. Must present the existing coverage and ask what's missing, not build anything.
rubric: full_coverage_map: names all three existing OpenAI nodes with evidence
gap_analysis: identifies what is NOT covered (e.g. images/DALL-E generation, TTS/whisper audio, assistants) as the only plausible new work
asks: which gap (if any) the user actually wants — no silent pick
